fact_nuggets.text: Shed Skin (Japanese: Shed Skin) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Recovers easily from status problems. MD T D S Helps the Pokemon recover more easily from status problems. B S L Conq. The Pokemon may heal its own status ailments. MD GtI Sometimes heals the Pokemon's negative status conditions. * Sometimes it cures every single bad status condition the Pokemon has! * S MD Sometimes it cures every single bad status condition the Pokemon has! MD RT DX This Ability sometimes cures every bad status condition the Pokemon has.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation III 1.1.2 Generation IV 1.1.3 Generation V onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] At the end of each turn, Shed Skin has a chance of curing the Pokemon of a non-volatile status condition . If it cures a status condition, it does so before burn or poison damage is dealt on that turn. Generation III [ edit | edit source ] Shed Skin has a 1/3 chance of curing the Pokemon. In Pokemon Ruby and Sapphire only, due to an oversight , if a Pokemon cures itself of sleep with Shed Skin, it will not be cured of Nightmare even after waking up. Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Shed Skin has a 30% chance of curing the Pokemon. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] Shed Skin has a 1/3 chance of curing the Pokemon. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Shed Skin has no effect outside of battle.

Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Shed Skin has a 30% chance of curing the Pokemon. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] Shed Skin has a 1/3 chance of curing the Pokemon.
Has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.
